zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog於1164年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd36歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Owain34歲。她於1180年與Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth在英國威爾斯文特凱爾萊昂結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog于1164年出生在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd36岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Owain34岁。她于1180年与Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth在英国威尔斯文特凱爾萊昂结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Gwerful
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

variants.name: Gweirful
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

variants.name: Gwerfyl
meanings: Traditional name composed of gwair ‘bend, ring, circle’ + the mutated form of mul ‘shy, modest’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog was born in 1164, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, was 36 and her mother, Gwenllian ferch Owain, was 34. She married Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth in 1180, in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog est née en 1164, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Owain, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth en 1180, à Caerleon, Gwent, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog 1164 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd 36 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian ferch Owain 34. Sie hat 1180 in Caerleon, Gwent, Wales, United Kingdom Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog è nata il nel 1164 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian ferch Owain, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth nel 1180, nel Caerleon, Gwent, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliogが1164年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffuddは36歳，母Gwenllian ferch Owainは34歳であった。1180年にイギリスウェールズグウエントケエルレオンでHywel Caerllion ap Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog(이)가 1164년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Owain(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1180년 영국 웨일스 그웬트 카이를리에서 Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog nasceu em 1164, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Owain, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth em 1180, em Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog родилась в 1164 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Owain, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth в 1180 г. в местности каирлеон, гвент, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwerful ferch Owain Cyfeiliog nació en 1164, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Owain, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Hywel Caerllion ap Iorwerth en 1180, en Caerleon, Gwent, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas.
